cover.title: SMOKZY
cover.subtitle: The Art of Shisha
cover.byline: Curated for Terra Mayaa · Craft Beers & Cocktails

founderNote.title: A note from the founder
founderNote.body:
When we started Smokzy, we didn't want to be just another shisha lounge. We wanted to bottle a feeling — the slow exhale at the end of a long day, the laughter shared between friends, the lingering memory of a perfectly tuned flavor.

Every pot in this book has been chosen by hand. Every flavor blended, tested, and re-tested until it was undeniably Smokzy. Tap any flavor to learn its story, its strength, its mood. Find the one that fits yours tonight.

Welcome in. Stay a while.

pots.name: The Classic Glass
pots.description: Our signature glass-base pot. Clean draw, balanced smoke, perfect for first-timers and purists alike.

flavors.name: Double Apple
flavors.description: The original. Sweet red apple wrapped around earthy green apple and a whisper of anise. The flavor that built the shisha world.

flavors.name: Mint Storm
flavors.description: Glacial peppermint with a long, cooling finish. Pairs beautifully with whiskey on the rocks.

flavors.name: Grape Ice
flavors.description: Concord grape candy on the inhale, a clean menthol exhale. Crowd favorite on warm nights.

pots.name: Smokzy Royale
pots.description: Hand-blown gold-rim base, wide bowl, pillow-soft draw. This is what we set the table for.

flavors.name: Midnight Blueberry
flavors.description: Wild blueberry compote layered over hints of vanilla cream. Heavy, indulgent, unforgettable.

flavors.name: Love Struck
flavors.description: Rose petals, pomegranate, a touch of cardamom. Built for date night.

flavors.name: Cuban Nights
flavors.description: A serious blend — aged tobacco notes, cocoa, smoked oak. For the experienced palate.

pots.name: Fruit Garden
pots.description: Fresh fruit shells replace the bowl. The flavor literally infuses through the fruit before reaching you.

flavors.name: Pineapple Express
flavors.description: Hollowed pineapple bowl. Sweet, tropical, light enough to share for hours.

flavors.name: Watermelon Crush
flavors.description: Watermelon shell, real chilled watermelon water in the base. Pure summer.

flavors.name: Blood Orange
flavors.description: Bittersweet citrus zest with a hint of campfire smoke. Sophisticated.

pairings.reason: The icy mint cuts straight through the smokiness and lets the whiskey caramel come forward.
Cocoa and aged tobacco notes mirror the espresso — they finish each other's sentences.
Both light and clean. Lets you sip and smoke for hours without flavor fatigue.
The orange peel and bourbon find a quiet harmony with rich berry sweetness.
Rose and pomegranate amplify the toasty notes in the wine. Made for celebrations.
A timeless pairing — the malt and the classic apple-anise just work.
